welcome_message:
Welcome to FA Quest Lab.

This bot can run different walking quests.
Enter the quest code from your teacher to begin.
invalid_code_message:
I cannot find this quest code.

Check the code from your teacher and try again.
inactive_code_message:
This quest code exists, but it is not active right now.

Ask your teacher whether the quest has already started.

MISSING2026.title: The Missing Reel
MISSING2026.description: Digital world vs real city walking quest.
MISSING2026.cover_caption:
Quest unlocked: The Missing Reel

The city kept the backup.
Now find it.
MISSING2026.headline: The city kept the backup. Now find it.

COORDINATE2026.title: The Lost Coordinate
COORDINATE2026.description: The past is fading. The city still knows the way.
COORDINATE2026.cover_caption:
Quest unlocked: The Lost Coordinate

The past is fading.
The city still knows the way.

A time-travel mystery through old Moscow.
COORDINATE2026.headline: When time forgets the road, follow the address that remembers.

BALANCE2026.title: Crisis Protocol: Balance
BALANCE2026.description: The crash will not look like an attack.
BALANCE2026.cover_caption:
CRISIS PROTOCOL: BALANCE

The crash will not look like an attack.

Echo-Zero detected. Human analysts required.
BALANCE2026.headline: Trust is the last reserve.

COMPASS2026.title: The Black Compass Route
COMPASS2026.description: Trace the cargo before the river swallows the route.
COMPASS2026.cover_caption:
THE BLACK COMPASS ROUTE

Trace the cargo before the river swallows the route.

A pirate adventure in supply chains and trade
COMPASS2026.headline: A route for those who know that trade is never just movement.

GRAVITY2026.title: The Silent Gravity
GRAVITY2026.subtitle: Three bodies entered the system. Only one answered.
GRAVITY2026.description: A sci-fi quest about EQUINOX-13, a missing ship, silent gravity, and the final decision about what comes home.
GRAVITY2026.headline: When the system drifts, find the force that still holds it together.

LEDGER2026.title: The Last Clean Ledger
LEDGER2026.subtitle: Every bottle left a number. Every number left a trail.
LEDGER2026.description: A Prohibition-era financial mystery through Bauman and Lefortovo.
LEDGER2026.headline: Every clean record hides a risk that someone tried to control.

MOSCOW2026.title: TOP SECRET: The Moscow File
MOSCOW2026.subtitle: Do not trust the official version.
MOSCOW2026.description: A declassified historical investigation through central Moscow.
MOSCOW2026.cover_caption:
TOP SECRET: THE MOSCOW FILE

Do not trust the official version.

Case No. 1147-M
Declassified Field Investigation
MOSCOW2026.headline: Do not trust the official version.
